# Brodie McCartan COMP 110 Final Project
## An Analysis of Course Survey Data and its Relation to Course Improvement Suggestions

This website addresses my idea that COMP 110 lectures should contain more examples of basic python coding principles to account for the portion of students that go into with little to no coding experience. Here, I create and analyze various data visuals from our course survey, looking at how many students enter the course with limited experience, as well as how experience relates to ratings of lecture effectiveness and understanding. 

## Data Visualization

<img src="/brodiem06.github.io-comp110project/static/imgs/bar1.png" alt="Image of second data visualization "  width="500"/>
Figure 2: Bar graph displaying the number of responses with each experience level

<img src="/brodiem06.github.io-comp110project/static/imgs/bar2.png" alt="Image of third data visualization "  width="500"/>
Figure 3: Bar graph with error bars showing the mean rating of lecture effectiveness by experience level.
